case_title: FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE VS. EDWARD FREEMAN et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF LISA MCCLELLAND RE: DEFAULT JUDGMENT (CCP 585 D) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-13-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE
AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $159.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT FREEMAN, EDWARD
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE SERVED APR-16-2002, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FREEMAN, EDWARD
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT /SETTLEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE
ORIGINAL SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE AS TO DEFENDANT FREEMAN, EDWARD
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $159.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT FREEMAN, EDWARD
DECLARATION OF GUY DAVISON IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE AS TO DEFENDANT FREEMAN, EDWARD
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-19-2002 CONTINUED TO SEP-13-2002 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212, PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE AS TO DEFENDANT FREEMAN, EDWARD DOES 1 TO 15 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-19-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-17-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUN-20-2002

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FREEMAN, EDWARD $6,976.51 PRINCIPAL, $159.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,135.51, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
